name: com.bytedance.pico.xr
description: Provides display and input support for PICO devices.

samples.description: Based on the Unity XR Interaction Toolkit, this demo focuses on addressing the need for complex combined interactions involving hand tracking and eye tracking in VR/MR development. Dependencies: • XR Interaction Toolkit • XR Hands • Shader Graph • HandVisualizer • Starter Assets sample • Hands Interaction Demo
